SELECT ?s WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s <http://example.org/predicate1> ?o } } UNION SELECT ?s WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph2> { ?s <http://example.org/predicate3> ?o } };

SELECT ?s WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s <http://example.org/predicate1> ?o } } INTERSECT SELECT ?s WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s <http://example.org/predicate2> ?o } };
SELECT (GROUP_CONCAT(?s) AS ?subjList) WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s ?p ?o } } GROUP BY ?p;
SELECT ?s WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s ?p ?o } } ORDER BY ?s LIMIT 10;
